titles.title: Thanks, Thanks, I Give Thee Thanks

properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v3 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thanks, thanks I give you thanks For all you've done. I am so blessed, My soul is at rest. Oh, Lord, I give you thanks.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank you Lord for the strength you give To simply carry on. Through life's toils and tests, And the worst and best, You never left me alone. You're always right beside me, You hear me every time I pray. And since I first began, You've been my dearest friend And I give you all the praise.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I give you thanks for this moment, And I will continually. For each day I live, your praise to give, I'm blessed abundantly. I can't forget that moment, When in my life you made such change. And since the Spirit came, I've not been the same. I just wanna give you thanks
